integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure the location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) rather than terminal commands (like curl) to modify the location.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenMRS/Bahmni application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual OpenMRS/Bahmni web interface, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal-based MySQL/PostgreSQL queries or database management tools being used to alter location tags.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location is exactly 'Telemedicine Wing'. The required tags to be added are 'Login Location' and 'Visit Location'. The system is OpenMRS/Bahmni, and the administrator credentials are username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'.
